query:
INSERT INTO last_check_update (
                source_id,
                manga_id,
                last_check,
                next_ts_arima
        ) VALUES (?1, ?2, ?3, ?4)
        ON CONFLICT(source_id, manga_id) DO UPDATE SET
        last_check = excluded.last_check,
        next_ts_arima = excluded.next_ts_arima
